<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Stop a PTT recording session and return the recognition result."}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/stt/ptt/{session_id}/stop"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Stops recording, runs Whisper inference on the captured audio,
and returns the transcription.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
